syntax_editor_macro.comments: This is a template for a server side ATF test script. Replace "FunctionXXX" by the function you want to test and adapt the input and expected parameters to match the actual requirements.
syntax_editor_macro.name: testscript

sys_update_version.name: syntax_editor_macro_a26ad832dbdfc410ba15a35305961966
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="syntax_editor_macro">
    <syntax_editor_macro action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <comments>This is a template for a server side ATF test script.
Replace "FunctionXXX" by the function you want to test and adapt the input and expected parameters to match the actual requirements.</comments>
        <name>testscript</name>
        <sys_class_name>syntax_editor_macro</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2020-03-05 15:21:25</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>a26ad832dbdfc410ba15a35305961966</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>9</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>testscript</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS" source="x_snc_devtools">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_scope>
        <sys_update_name>syntax_editor_macro_a26ad832dbdfc410ba15a35305961966</sys_update_name>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2020-09-09 14:03:08</sys_updated_on>
        <text>var strLog = '';
function Log(strText)
{
	strLog = strLog + "\n" + strText;
}
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual)
{
	var RenderValue = x_snc_devtools.RenderValue;

	var bResult = true;
	
	function FunctionXXX(vInput)
	{
		return 'Hello '+vInput;
	}

	function TestCase_FunctionXXX(vInput, vExpected)
	{
		Log('TestCase_FunctionXXX');
		Log('Input: '+RenderValue(vInput));
		Log('Expected: '+RenderValue(vExpected));
		var vResult = FunctionXXX(vInput);
		Log('Result  : '+RenderValue(vResult));
		if (vResult != vExpected)
		{
			bResult = false;
			Log('Test case FAILED');
		}
		Log('');
	}
	
	TestCase_FunctionXXX('John','Hello John');
	TestCase_FunctionXXX('Jane','Hello Jane');
		
	stepResult.setOutputMessage(strLog);
	return bResult;
	
})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);</text>
    </syntax_editor_macro>
</record_update>
